name: Vine Arrow
description:
Activate A (concentrate)

Leafy stalks protrude from the shaft of this rustic arrow. When an activated vine arrow hits a target, the arrow's shaft splits and grows, wrapping the target in vines.

The target takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for [[/r 2d4]] rounds, or until it Escapes against a DC of 19. On a critical hit, the target is also until it Escapes.
